product_overview: NELHEALTHCOACH API is the backend platform for secure coach and client management, health form processing, and AI-generated personalized wellness plans. It also supports document handling, media uploads, email workflows, and operational diagnostics for the broader coaching system.
core_goals: Process sensitive health and medical data securely
Generate personalized nutrition, exercise, and habit recommendations with AI
Support scalable CRUD operations for clients, recipes, exercises, and coaches
Enable document upload, extraction, and storage workflows
Provide authentication, authorization, and verification for coach accounts
Support operational monitoring, security checks, and system health diagnostics

features.name: Authentication System
features.description: Allows coaches to register, verify their email, log in, manage their profile, and reset or change their password.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/register with valid coach details -> Receive 201 with account creation message -> GET /api/auth/verify-email with verification token -> Receive 200 with email verified message -> POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token and coach profile
POST /api/auth/login with missing email or password -> Receive 400 with missing fields message
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 with invalid credentials message

POST /api/auth/forgot-password with registered email -> Receive 200 with password reset message -> POST /api/auth/reset-password with valid token and new password -> Receive 200 with password updated message
GET /api/auth/me with valid JWT token -> Receive 200 with authenticated coach profile -> PUT /api/auth/me with updated profile fields -> Receive 200 with updated profile data
POST /api/auth/change-password with currentPassword and newPassword -> Receive 200 with password updated message
POST /api/auth/resend-verification with email for an unverified account -> Receive 200 with resend confirmation message

features.name: Client Management
features.description: Supports creating, retrieving, updating, deleting, and listing client health records, including file upload references and encrypted personal and medical data.
user_flows: POST /api/clients with personalData, medicalData, and contractAccepted=true -> Receive 201 with client ID -> GET /api/clients/[id] with authenticated request -> Receive 200 with decrypted client details -> PUT /api/clients/[id] with updated personalData and medicalData -> Receive 200 with update confirmation -> DELETE /api/clients/[id] with authenticated request -> Receive 200 with client and associated files deleted message
POST /api/clients with missing required fields -> Receive 400 with missing required fields message
GET /api/clients with optional coach filtering -> Receive 200 with client list and metadata
GET /api/clients/[id] with non-existent client ID -> Receive 404 with client not found message

POST /api/clients/[id]/upload with file metadata -> Receive 200 with presigned uploadURL, fileKey, and fileURL -> PUT /api/clients/[id]/upload with fileKey and fileURL after upload -> Receive 200 with upload confirmation
DELETE /api/clients/[id]/upload with fileKey -> Receive 200 with upload deletion confirmation

features.name: AI Recommendation Engine
features.description: Generates personalized nutrition, exercise, and habit plans for a client, tracks recommendation progress, and provides downloadable PDFs for sessions.
user_flows: GET /api/clients/[id]/ai with authenticated request -> Receive 200 with AI progress and session status -> POST /api/clients/[id]/ai with monthNumber, coachNotes, and optional reprocessDocuments=true -> Receive 200 with sessionId and completed status -> GET /api/clients/[id]/ai/[sessionId]/pdf -> Receive 200 with downloadable PDF binary
POST /api/clients/[id]/ai with authenticated request and valid client context -> Receive 200 with generated recommendation session data
PUT /api/clients/[id]/ai with action=approve_session and valid sessionId -> Receive 200 with approval message and requestId
PUT /api/clients/[id]/ai with action=send_to_client and valid sessionId -> Receive 200 with send request confirmation
PUT /api/clients/[id]/ai with action=regenerate_session and valid sessionId -> Receive 200 with regeneration request confirmation
GET /api/clients/[id]/ai/[sessionId]/pdf with invalid or missing session -> Receive 404 with session not found message
PUT /api/clients/[id]/ai with invalid action value -> Receive 200 with error message in response payload and requestId

features.name: Exercise Library
features.description: Provides public access to exercises with search, creation, updates, and bulk deletion support, including coach edit proposal handling where applicable.
user_flows: GET /api/exercises with or without search terms -> Receive 200 with exercise list
POST /api/exercises with name, description, categories, instructions, equipment, difficulty, clientLevel, and muscleGroups -> Receive 200 with created exercise ID
PUT /api/exercises with coach edit proposal data -> Receive 200 with pendingApproval=true for coach-created change proposals
PUT /api/exercises with admin update data -> Receive 200 with success response
DELETE /api/exercises with IDs array -> Receive 200 with deletedCount result
DELETE /api/exercises with invalid or empty ids array -> Receive 200 with deletedCount 0 or failure payload depending on validation

features.name: Recipe Library
features.description: Manages recipes with search, CRUD operations, nutrition analysis, statistics, and image upload support.
user_flows: GET /api/recipes with optional search filtering -> Receive 200 with recipe list
POST /api/recipes with title, description, category, ingredients, instructions, and nutrition -> Receive 201 with created recipe data
GET /api/recipes/[id] with valid recipe ID -> Receive 200 with decrypted recipe data
PUT /api/recipes/[id] with updated fields -> Receive 200 with success message and updated recipe data
DELETE /api/recipes/[id] with valid recipe ID -> Receive 200 with recipe deleted message
POST /api/recipes/analyze-nutrition with ingredients and servings -> Receive 200 with nutrition analysis data and source
GET /api/recipes/stats -> Receive 200 with aggregated recipe statistics
GET /api/recipes/[id] with non-existent ID -> Receive 404 with recipe not found message

features.name: Coach Management
features.description: Allows admins to list coaches and generate registration links for new coach onboarding.
user_flows: GET /api/coaches with authenticated admin token -> Receive 200 with coach list
GET /api/coaches with authenticated non-admin token -> Receive 403 with forbidden message
GET /api/coaches/link with authenticated admin token -> Receive 200 with registration link and coachId

features.name: Edit Proposals
features.description: Lets coaches submit recipe or exercise edit proposals and lets admins review, approve, or reject them.
user_flows: POST /api/edit-proposals with targetType, targetId, and proposedChanges -> Receive 201 with proposal ID
GET /api/edit-proposals with authenticated coach token -> Receive 200 with coach-owned proposals
GET /api/edit-proposals with authenticated admin token -> Receive 200 with all proposals
PUT /api/edit-proposals/[id] with action=approve and reviewNotes -> Receive 200 with approval message
PUT /api/edit-proposals/[id] with action=reject and reviewNotes -> Receive 200 with rejection message

features.name: Lead Capture
features.description: Accepts public lead form submissions for free session requests and triggers email notifications.
user_flows: POST /api/leads with name, email, objective, and optional phone -> Receive 200 with success response
POST /api/leads with missing required fields -> Receive 400 with missing required fields message

features.name: Video Sessions
features.description: Creates LiveKit-backed video rooms, generates participant tokens, sends invites, and exposes session health and webhook handling.
user_flows: POST /api/video/rooms with clientId, scheduledAt, and optional durationMinutes -> Receive 201 with roomName and sessionId -> POST /api/video/token with roomName, role=coach, and sessionToken if needed -> Receive 200 with participant token and serverUrl -> POST /api/video/send-invite with clientId and sessionId -> Receive 200 with emailSent=true and joinLink
POST /api/video/rooms with missing clientId or scheduledAt -> Receive error response due to validation failure
POST /api/video/token with invalid roomName or role -> Receive error response or unauthorized token generation failure
POST /api/video/webhook with LiveKit event payload -> Receive 200 with webhook acknowledgement
GET /api/video/health -> Receive 200 with status ready or partial and component statuses

features.name: Health & Diagnostics
features.description: Provides system status, MongoDB diagnostics, dashboard statistics, and security evaluation utilities.
user_flows: GET /api/health -> Receive 200 with API working message and timestamp
GET /api/diagnostic -> Receive 200 with diagnostic details for MongoDB and system components
GET /api/stats with authenticated request -> Receive 200 with clientCount, recipeCount, and nearGoalPercentage
POST /api/security-check with request context -> Receive 200 with allowed status and optional reason or retryAfter
GET /api/stats without authentication -> Receive 401 or unauthorized response

features.name: Authentication System
features.description: Complete auth system with JWT tokens, coach registration, login, password management, email verification

endpoints.description: Authenticate coach with email/password, returns JWT token

response_schema.200: { success: true, token: string, coach: { id, email, firstName, lastName, role } }

endpoints.description: Register new coach account, sends verification email
Get authenticated coach profile with decrypted PII

response_schema.200: { success: true, data: { id, email, firstName, lastName, role } }

endpoints.description: Update coach profile fields
Change authenticated coach password
Request password reset email

response_schema.200: { success: true, message: "Si el email esta registrado..." }

endpoints.description: Reset password with token from email
Verify coach email with token
Resend verification email

features.name: Client Management
features.description: CRUD operations for client health forms and data

endpoints.description: List all clients with optional coach filtering and decrypted PII

response_schema.200: { success: true, data: Client[], metadata: { total, processed } }

endpoints.description: Create new client health form with encrypted PII and medical data

response_schema.201: { success: true, message: "Cliente registrado exitosamente", data: { _id } }

endpoints.description: Get full client details with decrypted medical data
Update client personal and medical data
Delete client and all associated S3 files

response_schema.200: { success: true, message: "Cliente y archivos asociados eliminados..." }

endpoints.description: Generate presigned S3 upload URL for client files (profile photo or documents)

response_schema.200: { success: true, data: { uploadURL, fileKey, fileURL } }

endpoints.description: Confirm file upload and save reference to MongoDB
Delete uploaded document by fileKey

features.name: AI Recommendation Engine
features.description: Generate and manage personalized health, nutrition, exercise, and habit plans using DeepSeek AI

endpoints.description: Get AI recommendation progress for a client with decrypted sessions

response_schema.200: { success: true, data: { hasAIProgress, aiProgress: { sessions, overallProgress } } }

endpoints.description: Generate new AI recommendations (nutrition, exercise, habits)

response_schema.200: { success: true, data: { sessionId, monthNumber, status: "completed" } }

endpoints.description: Update AI recommendation data (checklist, approve, send, regenerate, shopping list, import)
Generate downloadable PDF of AI recommendations

features.name: Exercise Library
features.description: CRUD for exercises with encryption, search, and coach edit proposals

endpoints.description: List all exercises with optional search filtering and decrypted fields
Create new exercise with encrypted fields
Update exercise (admin direct, coach creates edit proposal)

response_schema.200: { success: true } (admin) | { success: true, data: { pendingApproval: true } } (coach)

endpoints.description: Bulk delete exercises by IDs

features.name: Recipe Library
features.description: CRUD for recipes with nutrition analysis, image upload, and coach edit proposals

endpoints.description: List all recipes with optional search filtering
Create new recipe with encrypted fields
Get single recipe by ID with decrypted fields
Update recipe (admin direct, coach creates edit proposal)
Delete recipe and associated S3 image
Analyze nutrition for ingredients using AI
Get aggregate recipe statistics

response_schema.200: { success: true, data: { overall, byCategory, byDifficulty } }

features.name: Coach Management

endpoints.description: List all coaches (admin only)
Generate form registration link for coach

features.name: Edit Proposals

endpoints.description: List edit proposals (admin: all, coach: own)
Create new edit proposal
Approve or reject proposal (admin only)

features.name: Lead Capture
features.description: Public form lead submission with email notifications

endpoints.description: Submit lead form for free session request

features.name: Video Sessions
features.description: LiveKit-powered video session management with client invitations

endpoints.description: Create new video session room
Generate LiveKit participant access token
Send video session invitation email to client
Receive LiveKit webhook events
Video subsystem health check

features.name: Health & Diagnostics
features.description: System health check, diagnostics, and debug endpoints

endpoints.description: Simple API health check

response_schema.200: { success: true, message: "API is working!", timestamp }

endpoints.description: Full MongoDB and system diagnostic
Dashboard statistics (client count, recipe count, etc.)

response_schema.200: { success: true, data: { clientCount, recipeCount, nearGoalPercentage } }

endpoints.description: Arcjet-powered security evaluation (shield, bot detection, rate limiting)

known_limitations.issue: DELETE /api/exercises has no authentication check - bulk deletion is publicly accessible
known_limitations.impact: Anyone can delete exercises without authentication

known_limitations.issue: DELETE /api/recipes/[id] has no authentication check - recipe deletion is publicly accessible
known_limitations.impact: Anyone can delete recipes without authentication

known_limitations.issue: POST /api/clients (form submission) and POST /api/leads have no rate limiting beyond Arcjet
known_limitations.impact: Potential for form spam without additional safeguards

known_limitations.issue: /api/debug, /api/diagnostic, /api/test-ai, /api/test-email are public endpoints exposing system information
known_limitations.impact: Information disclosure - should be restricted in production

known_limitations.issue: Test email is hardcoded to a specific address
known_limitations.impact: Needs updating before use in different environments

known_limitations.issue: Inngest pipeline for transcription summarization and recommendation regeneration is TODO
known_limitations.impact: Transcriptions are stored but not processed into insights
